questions.stem: In behavior analysis, what is the primary function of interval recording?
options: To measure the frequency of a behavior over a set period.
To assess the duration of a specific behavior.
To determine the latency of a behavior before it occurs.
To record whether a behavior occurs within specified time intervals.
questions.answer: To record whether a behavior occurs within specified time intervals.
questions.explanation: Interval recording focuses on whether a behavior occurs during predetermined intervals, making it useful for tracking behaviors that may not happen frequently. The other options describe different measurement methods.
questions.kn_explanation: This KN code applies as it relates to behavioral assessment methods and their applications.
questions.quality_comment: The question accurately tests knowledge of interval recording in behavior analysis.
questions.suggestedParagraph: ## Use of Interval Recording in Behavior Analysis
questions.lessonExcerpt: Interval recording is used to record whether a behavior occurs within specified time intervals.
